query: SELECT id, planId, supplierId, status, createdAt FROM supplier_confirmations WHERE (planId, supplierId) IN (SELECT planId, supplierId FROM supplier_confirmations GROUP BY planId, supplierId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY planId, supplierId, createdAt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2oD5Rpux9cjqHPq.05f21cb26eb8 --database ZuNBVd6CLssbosJUyd9j6x --execute SELECT id, planId, supplierId, status, createdAt FROM supplier_confirmations WHERE (planId, supplierId) IN (SELECT planId, supplierId FROM supplier_confirmations GROUP BY planId, supplierId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY planId, supplierId, createdAt DESC;
